title: MediatorFamily
description: Catalog entry describing thermal-storage or transfer medium between source capture and target use. Governed by model-extension-2-spec-v0.2.1 §10. Output-driving fields: temperature_*, nominal_specific_energy_j_per_kg, nominal_density_kg_per_m3, nominal_thermal_buffer_fraction. Metadata-only fields: contamination_sensitivity, corrosion_sensitivity, cycling_risk, notes[].

phase_behavior_class.description: Phase behavior descriptor (e.g. solid-liquid PCM, sensible-only, hybrid).

temperature_min_k.description: Minimum operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §10.4. Constraint: min < nominal < max per §10.3.

temperature_nominal_k.description: Nominal operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §10.4.

temperature_max_k.description: Maximum operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §10.4.

nominal_specific_energy_j_per_kg.description: Nominal specific thermal energy capacity [J/kg]. Output-driving per §10.4. Constraint: > 0 per §10.3.

nominal_density_kg_per_m3.description: Nominal bulk density [kg/m³]. Output-driving per §10.4. Constraint: > 0 per §10.3.

nominal_thermal_buffer_fraction.description: Fraction of total stored energy available for buffering transfer [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §10.4. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §10.3.

compatible_absorber_classes.description: Absorber class IDs this mediator is compatible with per spec §10.1.

compatible_emitter_classes.description: Emitter class IDs this mediator is compatible with per spec §10.1.

cycling_risk.description: Qualitative thermal cycling risk. Metadata-only per §10.4.

output_effect_class.description: Declared output effect of this catalog entry per spec §12.4.

default_enabled_for_exploration.description: Whether this entry is pre-selected for exploratory comparison by default.

research_required.description: True if provenance_class is placeholder or hypothesis_only per spec §12.5.
